Constructor Detail

Enemy

public Enemy()

Enemy

public Enemy(java.lang.String baseName,
             int numOfImages,
             java.lang.String suffix)
Creates an Enemy with images for animation.

Parameters:
baseName - The base name of the image files to be loaded.
numOfImages - The number of images to be loaded.
suffix - The image type. I.e. ".png"
Method Detail

act

public void act()
Act - do whatever the Enemy wants to do. This method is called whenever the 'Act' or 'Run' button gets pressed in the environment.

Overrides:
act in class greenfoot.Actor

animate

protected void animate()

decreaseHealth

public void decreaseHealth(int amount)
Decreases this enemy's health equal to amount.

Parameters:
amount - The amount of health subtracted from this enemy
